commit_subject: Update moe int4 prefill and decode (#384)
useful_ideas: fused multi-GEMV dispatch to save launch overhead
fused residual add plus RMSNorm plus INT4 GEMV
caveats: llm-scaler INT4 GEMV uses group size 128 and scale shape [N, K/128]
llama.cpp GGUF Q4_0 uses block size 32, so the kernel is not drop-in compatible
plan_impact: Use llm-scaler as a BMG ESIMD and graph fusion reference. Continue Q4_0 work on fewer launches, less repeated quantization, and deeper projection/norm fusion rather than more communication flag sweeps.
